item.title: Error Bounds of Imitating Policies and Environments (NeurIPS 2020)
item.description: This blog summarizes our work of error bounds of imitating policies and environments, which is presented at NeurIPS 2020.

item.title: Efficient Exploration by Novelty Pursuit (DAI 2020)
item.description: This blog summarizes our work of efficient exploration by novelty pursuit, which is presented at DAI 2020.

item.title: Self-Guided Evolution Strategies with Historical Estimated Gradients (IJCAI 2020)
item.description: This blog summarizes our work of self-guided evolution strategies with historical estimated gradients, which is presented at IJCAI 2020.

item.title: Presentation
item.description: Talks [2020-10-24] Efficient exploration by novelty pursuit. DAI 2020, online. [slides] Paper Reading My paper reading presentation at the following seminar: RL Group at CUHKSZ, Deep Learning Group at CUHKSZ. [2021-04-15] Margin maximum and implicit bias. Deep Learning Group at CUHKSZ. [slides] [2021-04-09] Policy gradient methods. RL Group at CUHKSZ. [slides] [2021-03-09] Implicit bias of gradient descend on separable data. RL Group at CUHKSZ.

item.title: Publication
item.description: * indicates the equal contribution. [2020] Tian Xu, Ziniu Li, Yang Yu. Error Bounds of Imitating Policies and Environments. In Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 33 (NeurIPS), 2020. [paper] [poster] [code] [blog] Ziniu Li*, Xiong-Hui Chen*. Efficient Exploration by Novelty-pursuit. In Proceedings of the 2nd International Conference on Distributed Artificial Intelligence (DAI), 2020. [paper] [poster] [slides] [video] [blog] Fei-yu Liu, Ziniu Li, Chao Qian.

item.title: Teaching
item.description: I have been a teaching assistant for the following courses. FTE4560: Basic Machine Learning. 2021 Spring, CUHKSZ. MAT3007: Introduction to Optimization. 2020 Fall, CUHKSZ.
